title: phlomis brachyodon subsp. damascena
intro: Phlomis brachyodon subsp. damascena, also known as Syrian phlomis, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which may help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Phlomis brachyodon subsp. damascena include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, reduce stress and anxiety, and support the immune system. Phlomis brachyodon subsp. damascena can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its leaves and flowers can also be used in herbal preparations such as salves and creams.
